edge_reviews.notes: Distributed training depends on distributed systems; strength core is reasonable but synthesized from concept rather than directly cited.
Reduced precision training depends on numerical behavior and stability; core strength is reasonable.
Backpropagation is a common ingredient of neural training; common strength is reasonable.
MoE is related to expert partitioning, but an adapts relationship is not directly established by the cited source set.
